never holds tokens. This contract only builds calldata for users      to interact directly with licensed DEX protocols (Uniswap, etc.).            LEGAL: This is a ROUTER not an EXCHANGE. User approves DEX directly,      user calls DEX directly with routing hints from this contract.      VFIDE provides convenience, not custody.","kind":"dev","methods":{"addTokenRoute(address,string,uint8,address[])":{"details":"Path is a SUGGESTION - user executes swap directly on DEX"},"buildSwapCalldata(address,uint256,uint256,address)":{"details":"User approves and calls DEX directly.
